phases.label: Data/state schema
phases.must_prove: Game can store current screen, resources, stats, route unlocks, camp availability, inventory, and one upgrade.

phases.label: Core loop reducer/model
phases.must_prove: Travel -> search -> loot -> camp -> craft/rest -> unlock next node works without UI.
done_when: first 5 minute path can be simulated

phases.label: Playable UI slice
phases.must_prove: Player can click through the first expedition and understand the next goal.

phases.label: Visual target wiring
phases.must_prove: Runtime scene resembles the accepted fake shots enough for playtest.
done_when: mobile portrait layout is not broken

phases.label: Automation and proof
phases.must_prove: Desktop harness can click the critical path and capture screenshots.
done_when: mobile/web screenshot captured if web target exists
